data.description:
## Context / Problem
The approved Mypy flags have a bounded cleanup surface: no_implicit_optional and strict_equality are already clean; warn_redundant_casts has one finding at src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py:515; warn_unused_ignores has 23 findings, primarily stale reconciler ignores plus two workflow/schema ignores. Mypy already gates all src/rebar through Makefile:142-143.

## Approach
Remove or revalidate the 23 unused ignores, remove the redundant cast without changing behavior, enable the four approved global flags, and extend the existing ratchet test to pin them. Rejected: enabling disallow_any_generics or disallow_untyped_defs, because the operator explicitly deferred those flags.

## Scope
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py
- src/rebar/llm/workflow/editor.py
- only source files identified by Mypy unused-ignore diagnostics

## Testing
- Red: extend the ratchet test so it fails before the four flags are configured.
- Green: focused ratchet test and full make typecheck pass after the cleanup.
- Regression: existing tests covering edited code remain green; no behavior is intentionally changed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] pyproject.toml enables no_implicit_optional, strict_equality, warn_redundant_casts, and warn_unused_ignores globally; verified by tests/unit/test_mypy_ratchet.py.
- [ ] Mypy reports zero unused-ignore and redundant-cast findings across src/rebar; verified by make typecheck.
- [ ] disallow_any_generics and disallow_untyped_defs are not added or broadened; verified by the configuration diff.
- [ ] Focused tests for any behavior-adjacent edited modules plus the default suite pass; verified by pytest and recorded commands.
data.title: Enable safe immediate Mypy strictness flags
